commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And he will stretch out his hand against the north, and destroy Assyria; and will make Nineveh a desolation, and dry like a wilderness. The beautiful city. Ninive, which was destroyed soon after this, viz. , in the sixteenth year of the reign of Josias. (Challoner) (Year of the world 3378. ) Hebrew, "he shall make Ninive desolate. "(Haydock) This famous and potent city was at last destroyed. (Worthington) See Jonas iii.

commentaries.author: Richard Challoner
commentaries.content: The beautiful city: viz. Ninive, which was destroyed soon after this, viz., in the sixteenth year of the reign of Josias.
